title: Auto Map Update
description: Auto Map Update is a mod to make your map have all the new building you built after creating a map
body:
# Auto Map Update
Auto Update Mod will make your map always updated with no 1 FPS drop!

Created a map and built more buildings and want that on your already made map?
This mod will fix that!

----- Examples

![Real time map update on dirt to grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bfa8b082cc3ec63c8b86e37e0cb3521852abc3d.gif)

![House explode, real time map update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa77aa8cbecde3013e92b7c613feb713e57a091b.gif)
